SSPX was founded in opposition to the Second Vatican Council's reforms, including the use of vernacular language instead of Latin during Mass.
On 12 February 2026, Pagliarani met in Rome with Cardinal Víctor Manuel Fernández, prefect of the Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith.
The following day, the SSPX published a "Declaration of Catholic Faith", describing it as containing the "minimum necessary to be in communion" with the Catholic Church, while reiterating its criticisms of post–Vatican II teaching.
Later, on 8 July 2026, the SSPX released a statement saying they were "also ready to obey the Pope in all things", they added however, "provided that his orders do not imply adherence to the modernist doctrines of Vatican II and the post-conciliar period".
On 11 July 2026, SSPX appealed with the Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith against the excommunication decree.

This act incurs","score":0.7763013,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_%C3%89c%C3%B4ne_consecrations","title":"2026 Écône consecrations","content":"On 1 July 2026, members of the Society of Saint Pius X (SSPX) consecrated four bishops against the orders of Pope Leo XIV, causing the Pope to declare a schism","score":0.7680558,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.ewtnnews.com/vatican/sspx-consecrates-bishops-in-defiance-of-rome-s-schism-warning","title":"SSPX consecrates bishops in defiance of Rome's schism ...","content":"In a defiant move and despite repeated warnings from Rome, the Society of St. Pius X (SSPX) went ahead Wednesday, July 1, 2026, with the","score":0.7636429,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://sspx.org/en/news/timeline-society-saint-pius-xs-july-1-2026-episcopal-consecrations-60126","title":"A Timeline of the Society of Saint Pius X’s July 1, 2026, Episcopal Consecrations | District of the USA","content":"# A Timeline of the Society of Saint Pius X’s July 1, 2026, Episcopal Consecrations. Well before the February 2, 2026, announcement that the Society of Saint Pius X (SSPX) intended to consecrate new bishops to assist in its apostolic work, SSPX Superior General Fr. Davide Pagliarani met with Cardinal Luis Ladaria Ferrer, former Prefect of the Congregation for the Doctrine of the Faith. Contrary to Archbishop Pozzo’s July 7, 2026, statement that the Society had broken off talks in November 2018, this letter is proof that the Superior General remained open to discussion with an eye toward resolving the disagreements between the SSPX and Rome. In response, Cardinal Fernandez issued a communique outlining the need for further dialogue and to establish “the *minima* necessary for full communion with the Catholic Church,” which would make it possible “to define a canonical status for the Society.” In order to carry forth this dialogue, however, Cardinal Fernandez requested that the SSPX suspend the July 1, 2026, consecrations.","score":0.7555112,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://wherepeteris.com/thoughts-of-a-former-sspx-priest-on-the-july-1-consecrations","title":"Thoughts of a former SSPX priest on the July 1 consecrations - Where Peter Is","content":"It is well known that the schismatic Society of Saint Pius X plans to consecrate four bishops on July 1, 2026, in Écône, Switzerland — despite being warned explicitly that to do so would incur excommunication for both those ordained and those performing the ordinations. In selecting four again the leadership of the SSPX seems to be pointedly paying homage to Lefebvre, who once wrote of “the See of Peter and the posts of authority in Rome being occupied by anti-Christs.”. The members of the Society have been told they are canonically in a state of schism, and that excommunication will follow the consecrations. The advice to Rome of their intentions, and the submissions of dossiers of the ordinands, done, in the Society’s words, “in a spirit of respect toward the supreme authority of the universal Church,” is anything but respectful. They are not in danger of entering a state of schism, for they are *already* in a state of schism.","score":0.63939893,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":2.17,"request_id":"c944f9ca-ab55-4920-88bf-a76aae63152a"}
